name: Name
willBeFullyPaid: This settles the booking in full
occupancyHint: Booked time vs. available time in this period.
reserveForGuest: Reserve a service for a guest
reviewYourBooking: Review all the details before confirming.
noClientFoundName: No client named "{name}" found in this group.
noActiveServicesHotel: No active services for this hotel
noPricingSetFor: No {label} pricing set for this service
noSlotsForDuration: No slots available for this duration.
noSavedGuests: No saved guests in this group. Enter a new guest below.
noSavedGuestsMatch: No saved guests match your search. Enter a new guest below.
noRoomsCategory: No rooms of this category in this hotel. Add them in Settings → Hotels & Rooms.
weeklyScheduleHint: Set different hours per day, or mark a day closed.
defaultHoursApply: Default hours apply to every day.
blackoutDatesHint: Dates the service is fully closed (holidays, maintenance).
serviceClosedOnDate: The service is closed on this date.
manageClients: Manage frequent guests and their room assignments
searchClientsPlaceholder: Search by name, room number, or phone…
noClientsDesc: Add your frequent guests to quickly select them during booking.
noGroupsYet: No groups yet — create them in Settings → Client Groups.
contractLinkInvalid: Contract link must start with http:// or https://
contractsSubtitle: Partner organizations, their agreements, and renewal reminders
noContractsDesc: Add your partner organizations and track when their agreements expire.
tryClearFilters: Try clearing the filters or adjusting your search.
finishDateHint: When the agreement ends — drives renewal reminders.
contractLinkHint: Paste a shareable link (Google Drive, etc.). Opens in a new tab.
reminderHint: You'll be notified on the Notifications page at each selected point before the finish date, and again once it expires.
clientGroupsSubtitle: Custom categories to organize your clients (e.g. Private, Friends, Contractors).
noGroupsDesc: Create groups to categorize your clients however you like.
adminsSubtitle: Create hotel administrators and assign each one to a single hotel.
noAdminsDesc: Add an admin and assign them to a hotel so they can manage its bookings.
passwordKeepHint: Leave blank to keep the current password
addAtLeastOneCategory: Please add at least one room category
shortCodeFormat: Use 1–5 letters or digits (e.g. F, FG, FGH1)
shortCodeTaken: "{code}" is already used by another hotel
hotelCodeDesc: Each hotel has a unique compact code used to name its rooms (e.g. FG → FG-202).
noHotelsDesc: Add hotels to group your rooms and services.
roomsSectionDesc: Rooms are named with their hotel's code, like FG-202.
noRoomsDesc: Add rooms to a hotel to use room selection during booking.
unassignedHint: These rooms aren't linked to a hotel. Assign each one below.
assignRoomsAboveHint: Assign the rooms above to a hotel to see them grouped here.
shortCodeHint: Unique 2–6 char code. Used to name rooms — e.g. {code}-202.
categoryInputPlaceholder: Type category (e.g. Standard) and press Enter
roomCategoriesHint: Optional. Define categories to classify rooms (e.g., Standard, Lux). Keep alphabetical order or edit as needed.
categoryHasGroup: That category already has a pricing group
sharedWithHotelsHint: These hotels can book this same resource for their own guests. Availability and times are shared.
planDurationError: Each plan duration must be a multiple of 15 minutes
addPriceRowError: Add at least one price row to "{label}" or remove it
categoryDurationError: Each category price duration must be a multiple of 15 minutes
bufferTimesError: Buffer times must be a multiple of 15 minutes (e.g. 0, 15, 30)
servicesSubtitle: Manage bookable services and their availability across your hotels.
noServicesDesc: Add your first service to start taking bookings.
noServicesMatch: No services match your current filters.
pricingPlansDesc: Set prices per room category or client group. Add a plan and pick who it applies to.
variantsHint: Variants are configurations of the same resource (e.g. Half pool / Whole pool). Each has its own pricing; only one can be booked at a time.
noMoreRoomCats: No more room categories for this hotel. Add them in Hotels & Rooms.
noMoreClientGroups: No more client groups. Create them in Client Groups.
nameHint: The service name staff and guests see (e.g. Sauna, Pool).
iconHint: Icon shown next to this service in the calendar and lists.
hotelHint: The hotel that owns this service; its revenue is attributed here.
descriptionHint: A short description shown to staff during booking.
detailsHint: Extra details or equipment (e.g. vehicle model, capacity).
opensAtHint: Earliest time this service can be booked each day.
closesAtHint: Latest end time for bookings each day.
bufferBeforeHint: Prep time reserved before each booking; it blocks the slot.
bufferAfterHint: Cleaning/turnaround time reserved after each booking.
calendarColorHint: Color used for this service's bookings in the calendar.
notificationsSubtitle: Renewal reminders for contracts nearing their finish date
noNotificationsDesc: No contracts are expiring soon. Reminders appear here 30 and 7 days before a contract's finish date.
planExpiredBanner: Your plan has expired. The app is read-only until it's renewed.
companiesSubtitle: Manage every company using Bronit, their plan, and their owner accounts.
noCompaniesDesc: Add your first company to give them a login and a dashboard.
landingHeroTitle: Service booking, run the easy way
landingHeroSubtitle: Bronit helps hotels manage rooms, staff, and guest service bookings — from spa slots to conference halls — in one simple dashboard.
landingstep1Desc: Add your hotels, rooms, and the services you offer guests.
landingstep2Desc: Give each hotel's team their own login, scoped to just their hotel.
landingstep3Desc: Staff book services for guests and track payment and status in real time.
plan_standard_desc: For a single hotel getting started.
plan_pro_desc: For growing hotel groups with multiple properties.
plan_vip_desc: Full features, priority support, and onboarding help.
demoSubtitle: Pick a demo hotel to explore — nothing you do here is saved anywhere but this browser.
demoServicesHint: Book any service below — it's saved only in this browser, never sent to a server.
noDemoBookings: No demo bookings yet — try booking a service above.
lpAdvantageSolution: Quality of service solution will be Bronit
lpHeroSubtitle: Ditch Excel. Bronit runs your bookings, payments, and team alerts — end to end.
lpSlideFeatTitle: Everything you need to run bookings
lpContactTitle: Want us to call you back?
lpContactDesc: Leave your name and phone — our team will reach out shortly.
lpContactError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
lpStatsDisclaimer: Figures illustrate typical results from digitizing manual service logs.
lpPillarsTitle: One platform — every service under control
lpPillarsSub: Three tools that replace paper journals, Excel sheets, and lost phone messages.
lpPillar1Desc: Income, occupancy, and outstanding balances per hotel and per service — live, not at month end.
lpPillar1P1: Income by service and by hotel
lpPillar2Desc: A visual calendar for every service with buffer times, deposits, reschedules, and per-weekday schedules.
lpPillar2P1: No overlaps — slots respect capacity and cleanup time
lpPillar3Desc: Run several hotels under one account. Each admin sees only their own hotel — you see everything.
lpReviewsSub: What owners and managers say after switching from paper journals.
lpReview1Quote: Before, our spa bookings lived in a notebook at reception. Now I see every slot and every payment from my phone — even when I'm abroad.
lpReview2Quote: The owner dashboard shows all three of our hotels at once. Telegram alerts mean I know about a new conference-hall booking within seconds.
lpReview3Quote: Deposits used to be chaos. Now every partial payment is tracked, and the outstanding balance report closes our cash gap discussions.
lpModulesTitle: Everything included — no extra modules to buy
lpModulesSub: Each plan ships the full toolkit. Higher plans add more hotels and staff seats.
lpPricingSub: Simple monthly pricing in UZS. Start on the demo, pay when you're ready.
lpPricingContact: Need more hotels or custom terms? Contact us — VIP plans are flexible.
lpFaqSub: Quick answers before you try the demo.
lpFaq1A: Same day. We create your company account, you add hotels, rooms, and services — most teams take bookings within an hour of first login.
lpFaq2A: The booking flow is a guided step-by-step wizard in Uzbek, Russian, or English. Reception staff typically learn it in one shift.
lpFaq3Q: What happens when my plan expires?
lpFaq3A: Your data is never deleted. The account switches to read-only until you renew — you can still view every booking and report.
lpFaq4Q: Is my data isolated from other hotels?
lpFaq4A: Yes. Every company gets its own isolated workspace — no other company can ever see your bookings, clients, or prices.
lpFinalCtaTitle: See your hotel's services in one dashboard
lpFinalCtaSub: Open the live demo — a real owner account with hotels, bookings, and analytics already inside. No registration needed.
demoOwnerSubtitle: A real owner account of a sample hotel group — with hotels, bookings, clients, and analytics already inside.
demoPoint1: Full owner dashboard: income, occupancy, and outstanding balances across two demo hotels
demoPoint2: Live booking calendar — create, reschedule, and take deposits on real slots
demoPoint3: Clients, VIP groups, and corporate contracts with expiry reminders
demoPoint4: Settings: hotels, rooms, services, staff accounts — everything an owner controls
demoUnavailable: The demo is being refreshed — please try again in a minute.
demoResetNote: This is a shared sandbox — its data is periodically reset. Anything you create here is visible to other visitors.
universalLoginHint: Sign in — we'll take you to your workspace
hotelSlugHint: Admins of this hotel sign in at …/admin/{slug}/login. Leave empty to use the hotel name.
hotelSlugTaken: Another hotel already uses this slug
metaDescription: Bronit brings spa slots, conference halls, pools and every bookable hotel service into one dashboard — with payments, deposits, staff roles, and instant Telegram alerts.
metaOgDescription: One dashboard for every bookable hotel service: bookings, payments, deposits, staff roles, and Telegram alerts.
metaTwitterDescription: One dashboard for every bookable hotel service.
